channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Male Disguise, Remote-Controlled Bomb, Snake Tattoo: Inside Monaco Bomb Attack

media:content.media:description: Anastasiia Berezovska, has a tattoo of a snake on her arm

item.description: The suspect, Anastasiia Berezovska, has a tattoo of possibly a snake on her right arm from the shoulder to the elbow. It says she was born in Ukraine, has dark hair, and speaks German.
item.content:encoded: The suspect, Anastasiia Berezovska, has a tattoo of possibly a snake on her right arm from the shoulder to the elbow. It says she was born in Ukraine, has dark hair, and speaks German.

item.title: Dog Missing For A Month Found Celebrating With FIFA Fans In Mexico

media:content.media:description: The dog immediately recognised her owner, and the reunion took place after a month of separation.

item.description: Social media users also reacted to it, with one X user saying that they loved this update on Gorda.
item.content:encoded: Social media users also reacted to it, with one X user saying that they loved this update on Gorda.

item.title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Funeral News LIVE Updates: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's Funeral Begins In Iran

media:content.media:description: Iran Former Supreme Leader's Khamenei Funeral: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's remains arrived in Tehran today.

item.description: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Preparations for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's public funeral are taking place in Tehran, following which his remains will be taken to the Iraqi holy cities of Najaf and Karbala.
item.content:encoded: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Preparations for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's public funeral are taking place in Tehran, following which his remains will be taken to the Iraqi holy cities of Najaf and Karbala.

item.title: 'Madam Is Sleeping': Ex-Diplomat's Call With Benazir Bhutto During 1991 Hijack

media:content.media:description: Kausikan was serving in Singapore's foreign service at the time

item.description: Kausikan recalled that when he tried to reach Bhutto, he found out she was in Sindh at the time with her family. He said that it was around 3 am when he managed to get the contact of Bhutto's residence with the help of the then Pakistani high commissioner.
item.content:encoded: Kausikan recalled that when he tried to reach Bhutto, he found out she was in Sindh at the time with her family. He said that it was around 3 am when he managed to get the contact of Bhutto's residence with the help of the then Pakistani high commissioner.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | How Texas Became Hub Of A Terror-Link Kashmiri Outfit's Activities
item.description: Across the state, a collection of terror networks and their Islamist partners are using US politicians, institutions and nonprofit infrastructure to advance violent, radical ambitions.
item.content:encoded: Across the state, a collection of terror networks and their Islamist partners are using US politicians, institutions and nonprofit infrastructure to advance violent, radical ambitions.

item.title: Pegasus Strikes Again: Politician Investigating Spyware Abuse Ends Up Hacked

media:content.media:description: This reignites controversy over governments using spyware to target critics illegally.

item.description: Security researchers have confirmed that a European politician had his phone hacked with the Pegasus spyware while serving on an investigatory committee probing abuses of the notorious surveillance tool.
item.content:encoded: Security researchers have confirmed that a European politician had his phone hacked with the Pegasus spyware while serving on an investigatory committee probing abuses of the notorious surveillance tool.

item.title: 40 Dead As Bus Plunges Into Ravine In Pakistan's Balochistan

media:content.media:description: The bus went out of control and fell into the ravine in Dana Sar

item.description: A bus carrying stranded passengers from a broken-down vehicle went out of control in Balochistan, marking one of Pakistan's deadliest road crashes.
item.content:encoded: A bus carrying stranded passengers from a broken-down vehicle went out of control in Balochistan, marking one of Pakistan's deadliest road crashes.

item.title: France Records 30% Rise In Deaths During June Heatwave: Report

media:content.media:description: France Heatwave Deaths Surge as Government Faces Political Backlash

item.description: Deaths in France jumped nearly 30% during June's record heatwave, with Paris hospitals bracing for a toll that could rival the deadly 2003 crisis
item.content:encoded: Deaths in France jumped nearly 30% during June's record heatwave, with Paris hospitals bracing for a toll that could rival the deadly 2003 crisis

item.title: 'America250': All About July 4 US Independence Anniversary Celebrations

media:content.media:description: July 4, 2026, marks the 250th anniversary of signing of the Declaration of Independence in Philadelphia.

item.description: Ahead of the grand day on July 4, activities have already begun across the nation, including commemorative events and nationwide campaigns.
item.content:encoded: Ahead of the grand day on July 4, activities have already begun across the nation, including commemorative events and nationwide campaigns.

item.title: Alibaba To Ban Claude Code For Employees Amid Security Concerns

media:content.media:description: Alibaba did not immediately respond to a request for comment

item.description: Alibaba will bar staff from using Anthropic's Claude Code starting July 10 over alleged embedded security backdoors, a source told Reuters
item.content:encoded: Alibaba will bar staff from using Anthropic's Claude Code starting July 10 over alleged embedded security backdoors, a source told Reuters

item.title: US Declared Its Independence On July 2, But Why Is It Celebrated On July 4?

media:content.media:description: US Independence Day is celebrated on July 4.

item.description: Although the Continental Congress voted for independence on July 2, 1776, July 4 became America's official Independence Day. Here's why the two dates continue to spark historical debate.
item.content:encoded: Although the Continental Congress voted for independence on July 2, 1776, July 4 became America's official Independence Day. Here's why the two dates continue to spark historical debate.

item.title: US Teen Lost Her Hand, Leg In Shark Attack. Now An Alert System Is Named After Her

media:content.media:description: Trump Signs "Lulu's Law": Alabama Shark Attack Survivor Inspires Phone Alerts

item.description: Inspired by Alabama teen Lulu Gribbin who lost two limbs in a 2024 Florida shark bite, a new US law greenlights immediate smartphone emergency alerts.
item.content:encoded: Inspired by Alabama teen Lulu Gribbin who lost two limbs in a 2024 Florida shark bite, a new US law greenlights immediate smartphone emergency alerts.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Pak Needs To Understand: Its Indus Treaty 'Threats' To India Are Fooling No One
item.description: Pakistan's hysterics and fits haven't impressed India, much less make her re-consider her stand on the treaty. If Islamabad is trying to threaten its way to water, it is already failing.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan's hysterics and fits haven't impressed India, much less make her re-consider her stand on the treaty. If Islamabad is trying to threaten its way to water, it is already failing.

item.title: Why Was Ayatollah Khamenei's Funeral Delayed And Where Was His Body Till Now?

media:content.media:description: Khamenei's burial is being held over four months after his death

item.description: There have been rumours that his body was temporarily buried, but Iranian officials have insisted the delay was due to severe, volatile conditions of the active war with the United States and Israel.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1122057/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>There have been rumours that his body was temporarily buried, but Iranian officials have insisted the delay was due to severe, volatile conditions of the active war with the United States and Israel.

item.title: El Nino Set To Intensify Between July And September, Warns UN

media:content.media:description: The WMO said it was stepping up early warning support to help guide preparedness

item.description: El Nino conditions have set in and are forecast to rapidly strengthen into a strong event by September, raising risks of heatwaves worldwide
item.content:encoded: El Nino conditions have set in and are forecast to rapidly strengthen into a strong event by September, raising risks of heatwaves worldwide

item.title: Pakistan Uses Cement On Vedic-Era Taxila Walls, Gets 'Delisting' Warning From UN

media:content.media:description: The ruins at Taxila reveal the pattern of urban evolution on the Indian subcontinent

item.description: Taxila, located in the Rawalpindi district of Pakistan's Punjab province, is a vast serial site that includes a Mesolithic cave and the archaeological remains of four early settlement sites, Buddhist monasteries, and a mosque and madrassa.
item.content:encoded: Taxila, located in the Rawalpindi district of Pakistan's Punjab province, is a vast serial site that includes a Mesolithic cave and the archaeological remains of four early settlement sites, Buddhist monasteries, and a mosque and madrassa.

item.title: Florida Woman's Driveway Stolen As Part Of Nigerian Scam

media:content.media:description: The missing driveway has been tied to a Nigeria-based scam (Representative pic).

item.description: A Florida woman had her driveway ripped up and taken away as part of an alleged scam.
item.content:encoded: A Florida woman had her driveway ripped up and taken away as part of an alleged scam.

item.title: Israel Wanted To Kill Top Iranian Negotiators. How US Saved Them

media:content.media:description: In March, it was reported that Araghchi and Ghalibaf were on an Israeli target list

item.description: Araghchi and Ghalibaf have been the key officials negotiating with various countries in the region to reach a framework agreement with the US that sought to open the Strait of Hormuz and set the outline for follow-on talks on Tehran's nuclear program.
item.content:encoded: Araghchi and Ghalibaf have been the key officials negotiating with various countries in the region to reach a framework agreement with the US that sought to open the Strait of Hormuz and set the outline for follow-on talks on Tehran's nuclear program.

item.title: "Ridiculous": Trump Criticises "One-Sided Relationship" With NATO

media:content.media:description: Trump has repeatedly lashed out at European allies over their response to the war in Iran

item.description: Donald Trump hit out at European allies over defense spending and the war in Iran as Washington moves to scale back its long-term NATO commitments.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump hit out at European allies over defense spending and the war in Iran as Washington moves to scale back its long-term NATO commitments.

item.title: Top Iran General Emerges From Hiding Ahead Of Ali Khamenei's Funeral

media:content.media:description: Vahidi himself hasn't been seen publicly since February 8, weeks before the Iran war began (File)

item.description: Gen. Ahmad Vahidi resurfaces after weeks in hiding, joining Iran's leadership as Tehran begins a dayslong funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei.
item.content:encoded: Gen. Ahmad Vahidi resurfaces after weeks in hiding, joining Iran's leadership as Tehran begins a dayslong funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei.
